name: epi
description: Search and rank engineering papers for an EPI wiki.

interface.shortDescription: Find, vet, and stage high-quality engineering papers for agent-mediated Obsidian wiki ingest.
interface.longDescription: EPI (Engineering Paper Intelligence) packages a Codex workflow for configurable paper discovery, evidence-grounded reader/critic review, MinerU parsing, and low-burden reading reports. It preserves raw artifacts and prepares wiki-ingest handoffs for an agent to write into the target Obsidian/LLM Wiki according to that vault's contract.
